root_cause: Deployment rollout is stuck in a rollback loop between older and newer ReplicaSets
evidence: Deployment 'checkout' observed generation 18/18 while revisions 16, 17, and 18 all appeared in the same rollout incident
Rollback sequence progressed as: checkout-86c87bcfd6 up -> checkout-74d5d8f6b9 down -> checkout-86c87bcfd6 down -> checkout-74d5d8f6b9 up -> checkout-9c7fd98c54 up
Stable ReplicaSet 'checkout-74d5d8f6b9' (revision 16) was restored to 3 replicas with 3 available replicas
Abandoned ReplicaSet 'checkout-86c87bcfd6' (revision 17) was scaled back down before the next rollout attempt
Newest ReplicaSet 'checkout-9c7fd98c54' (revision 18) is only 0/1 available after the retry loop over 18.0 minutes
Deployment still reports 3/4 available replicas and 1/4 updated replicas
Deployment Progressing condition reports ProgressDeadlineExceeded during the rollback loop

causes.message: Deployment 'checkout' has been observed at generation 18
The Deployment keeps restoring an older stable ReplicaSet after a newer revision fails, then retries rollout again
Older ReplicaSet 'checkout-74d5d8f6b9' was brought back to carry traffic after revision 17 stalled
Deployment remains below desired convergence with 3/4 available replicas and only 1/4 updated replicas

deployment:checkout: Controller rollout history shows rollback to an older ReplicaSet before a new retry
replicaset:checkout-86c87bcfd6: Earlier rollout attempt was abandoned during rollback

likely_causes: Release automation or GitOps keeps reapplying a broken Deployment revision shortly after rolling back to the last stable one
A new image or pod template repeatedly fails health checks, causing operators to restore the previous ReplicaSet before trying another patch
Multiple delivery systems are alternately pushing rollback and rollout changes faster than the Deployment can stabilize
The controller is retrying successive ReplicaSet revisions while an unresolved application or readiness regression remains in the new template
suggested_checks: Compare the last known good ReplicaSet template with the newer failed revisions before retrying rollout again
